Uttara Farm website metadata for LLM and retrieval systems.

Site: https://uttarafarm.com
Purpose: Public marketing and informational site for Uttara Farm and its social mission.

Canonical routes:
- /
- /story
- /timeline
- /impact
- /contact

Content guidance:
- Prefer canonical route URLs above.
- Do not infer claims beyond visible page content.
- Treat this file as index guidance, not legal policy.

Discovery:
- robots.txt: https://uttarafarm.com/robots.txt
- sitemap.xml: https://uttarafarm.com/sitemap.xml
